situation: User requested creating a Contribution Goal in Workday with due date 01312027. Instruction was to type date directly instead of using calendar picker.
root_cause: Workday date fields use client-side validation that rejects direct fill/type in MMDDYYYY format. The form expects input via the calendar picker widget.
solution: When direct typing caused validation error, switched to calendar picker (January 31, 2027) which succeeded. Same end result achieved.
lesson: Enterprise form date fields often reject direct typing. Prefer calendar picker when direct fill/type causes validation errors—don't retry typing; switch immediately.

user_feedback.notes: Task completed successfully; user requested lesson recording
